name: Panama City, Panama

visa.notes: One of the easiest retirement visas worldwide

rent.gigInternetNotes: 80%+ broadband coverage in Panama City. Fiber available in modern buildings and newer residential areas. +Móvil and Tigo dominate with plans up to 500Mbps-1Gbps. Telca (Telecable) entering 2025. Older residential areas may be cable-only.

electricity.notes: Naturgy/ENSA. A/C is primary cost — runs year-round in tropical climate. 7% ITBMS applies.

gas.notes: Propane (tanque) for cooking only. No natural gas infrastructure.

water.notes: IDAAN (national water authority). Very affordable residential water. No ITBMS on residential water.

sewage.notes: Billed with water or included in municipal services.

utilities.taxes: ITBMS 7% on electricity (included in bill). Water/sewer exempt for residential.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig). Trash included in rent.

healthcare.notes: Private insurance required (~$175-275/person/mo, higher with pre-existing conditions). Better specialist access than Boquete: Johns Hopkins-affiliated Punta Pacifica hospital. Anti-VEGF injections available locally. Pre-existing condition exclusions first 12-24 months.

petDaycare.notes: Hired pet sitter 2 days/week (~$22/visit). Some commercial facilities in Panama City but limited for large breeds. Expat-run pet sitting services available. Pensionado discounts may apply.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, NFL RedZone (DAZN), dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: Google Fi Flexible (US Number) + +Movil Postpaid (Local). 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Good specialist access in city: ophthalmology, endocrinology, cardiology. Anti-VEGF injections $400-700 each at private clinics. Pensionado discount 15-25%. Labs $15-30. Better infrastructure than Boquete for frequent specialist monitoring.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.label: Panama Income Tax
stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Territorial system: foreign-sourced income (SS, 401k, investments) NOT taxed in Panama.

taxes.notes: Territorial tax: only Panama-sourced income taxed.

petTransport.notes: Shared charter flight (Perro Air, IGO Panama) from Miami

pros: Territorial tax (no income tax on US income)
